samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_8bit">
    <description>A simplified radix-2 divider for 8-bit signed or unsigned integers.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">The clock signal for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst">The reset signal to initialize or reset the module.</input>
        <input id="sign">Indicates if the operation is signed (1) or unsigned (0).</input>
        <input id="dividend" width_description="[7:0]">The dividend for division.</input>
        <input id="divisor" width_description="[7:0]">The divisor for division.</input>
        <input id="opn_valid">A valid operation request is present.</input>
        <output id="res_valid">The result is valid and ready.</output>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">The output containing the remainder in the upper 8 bits and the quotient in the lower 8 bits.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="DIVIDE">1'b1</constant>
        <constant id="IDLE">1'b0</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <signal id="state" type="reg" width="1">The current state of the divider.</signal>
        <signal id="next_state" type="wire" width="1">The next state of the divider.</signal>
        <signal id="cnt" type="reg" width="4">The counter for the division process.</signal>
        <signal id="start_cnt" type="reg" width="1">Starts the counter.</signal>
        <signal id="neg_divisor" type="reg" width="9">The negative value of the divisor.</signal>
        <signal id="remainder" type="reg" width="9">The remainder during the division process.</signal>
        <signal id="quotient" type="reg" width="8">The quotient during the division process.</signal>
        <signal id="SR" type="reg" width="17">Shift Register for the division process.</signal>
        <signal id="sub_result" type="wire" width="9">The result of the subtraction.</signal>
        <signal id="mux_out" type="wire" width="9">The output of the multiplexer.</signal>
        <signal id="carry_in" type="wire" width="1">The carry-in for the subtraction.</signal>
        <signal id="temp_remainder" type="reg" width="9">Temporary remainder storage.</signal>
        <signal id="temp_quotient" type="reg" width="8">Temporary quotient storage.</signal>
        <signal id="final_remainder" type="reg" width="9">Final remainder storage.</signal>
        <signal id="final_quotient" type="reg" width="8">Final quotient storage.</signal>
        
        // State transition logic
        always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
            if (rst) begin
                state <= IDLE;
            end else begin
                state <= next_state;
            end
        end
        
        // Next state logic
        always @(*) begin
            case(state)
                DIVIDE: begin
                    if(cnt == 4'd8) begin
                        next_state = IDLE;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = DIVIDE;
                    end
                end
                default: begin
                    if(opn_valid && !res_valid) begin
                        next_state = DIVIDE;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = IDLE;
                    end
                end
            endcase
        end
        
        // Counter logic
        always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
            if(rst) begin
                cnt <= 4'd0;
            end else if(start_cnt) begin
                cnt <= cnt + 1;
            end else begin
                cnt <= 4'd0;
            end
        end
        
        // Negate divisor logic
        always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
            if(rst) begin
                neg_divisor <= 9'd0;
            end else if(sign) begin
                neg_divisor <= {~divisor[7], ~divisor} + 9'd1;
            end else begin
                neg_divisor <= {1'b0, divisor};
            end
        end
        
        // Remainder calculation logic
        always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
            if(rst) begin
                remainder <= 9'd0;
            end else if(state == DIVIDE) begin
                remainder <= sub_result;
            end else begin
                remainder <= 9'd0;
            end
        end
        
        // Quotient calculation logic
        always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
            if(rst) begin
                quotient <= 8'd0;
            end else if(state == DIVIDE) begin
                quotient[cnt] <= mux_out[8];
            end else begin
                quotient <= 8'd0;
            end
        end
        
        // Shift Register logic
        always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
            if(rst) begin
                SR <= 17'd0;
            end else if(state == DIVIDE) begin
                SR <= {mux_out[7:0], SR[8]};
            end else begin
                SR <= {1'b0, dividend, 8'd0};
            end
        end
        
        // Subtraction logic
        assign sub_result = {1'b0, SR[16:9]} + neg_divisor;
        
        // Multiplexer logic
        assign mux_out = (sub_result[8]) ? temp_remainder : temp_quotient;
        
        // Carry-in logic
        assign carry_in = (sub_result[8]) ? 1'b0 : 1'b1;
        
        // Temporary remainder storage logic
        always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
            if(rst) begin
                temp_remainder <= 9'd0;
            end else if(state == DIVIDE) begin
                temp_remainder <= {sub_result[7:0], SR[8]};
            end else begin
                temp_remainder <= 9'd0;
            end
        end
        
        // Temporary quotient storage logic
        always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
            if(rst) begin
                temp_quotient <= 8'd0;
            end else if(state == DIVIDE) begin
                temp_quotient[cnt] <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                temp_quotient <= 8'd0;
            end
        end
        
        // Final remainder storage logic
        always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
            if(rst) begin
                final_remainder <= 9'd0;
            end else if(state == DIVIDE && cnt == 4'd8) begin
                final_remainder <= temp_remainder;
            end else begin
                final_remainder <= 9'd0;
            end
        end
        
        // Final quotient storage logic
        always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
            if(rst) begin
                final_quotient <= 8'd0;
            end else if(state == DIVIDE && cnt == 4'd8) begin
                final_quotient <= temp_quotient;
            end else begin
                final_quotient <= 8'd0;
            end
        end
        
        // Output assignment
        assign result = {final_remainder, final_quotient};
        
        // Control logic for start_cnt
        always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
            if(rst) begin
                start_cnt <= 1'b0;
            end else if(opn_valid && !res_valid) begin
                start_cnt <= 1'b1;
            end else begin
                start_cnt <= 1'b0;
            end
        end
        
        // Control logic for res_valid
        always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
            if(rst) begin
                res_valid <= 1'b0;
            end else if(cnt == 4'd8) begin
                res_valid <= 1'b1;
            end else if(res_valid && res_ready) begin
                res_valid <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                res_valid <= res_valid;
            end
        end
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Described above.</implementation>
</module>
